case_title: TATAYANA VINOKUROVA VS. AKASH CHOPRA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VINOKUROVA, TATAYANA AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPRA, AKASH DOES 1-30, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPRA, AKASH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VINOKUROVA, TATAYANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOPRA, AKASH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 175 BLUXOME STREET, NO. 205, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 941007, ***PLEASE INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF VINOKUROVA, TATAYANA SERVED OCT-02-2016, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-30, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $143.34 FILED BY PLAINTIFF VINOKUROVA, TATAYANA
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VINOKUROVA, TATAYANA AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPRA, AKASH

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPRA, AKASH
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPRA, AKASH
